name: order-confirm
title: Order Confirm
author: mcpcn
description: Order confirmation with product image, delivery info, and confirm action.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with product image and delivery info
changelog.1.0.3: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.0.4: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.1.1.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
